positioning.label: For
positioning.text: Mid-career professionals who feel trapped in the wrong career or role

positioning.label: Who
positioning.text: Are stuck, unfulfilled, and disconnected from their true identity

positioning.label: We
positioning.text: Help them reclaim their identity through a structured coaching journey

positioning.label: So They
positioning.text: Can step into a career and life they are truly proud of

archetype.title: Brand Archetype — The Wounded Healer meets The Champion
archetype.text: Our founder has lived the paradox — outwardly successful while privately navigating real pain. That lived experience is the authority. We don't just teach transformation. We have been through it.

pillars.subtitle: The Human Why
pillars.description: Is there a real need? We start with empathy — identifying the deep human struggle before anything else. Before strategy comes truth.

pillars.subtitle: The Strategic How
pillars.description: Does it make sense? We evaluate how transformation fits within your long-term goals, values, and life strategy. Sustainable change is the only kind worth making.

pillars.subtitle: The Real-World What
pillars.description: Can we actually do it? We bring ideas to earth with practical roadmaps, clear actions, and real accountability. No fluff — just momentum.
